titleStmt.title: SII 6.113: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 113. (A.R. No. 154-A of 1897). ON THE OTHER SIDE OF THE SAME STONE. At the top of the stone a few lines are lost. The inscription seems to be a continuation of number.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
catussa
Antanibaru daṇḍanāyakaru sama baṁdu
yī managaḷalirddu dēvarige taṁtamma karmmāntarada besaṁ
gaḷaṁ māḍi mū(ṁ)nūrvvaru sānigaruṁ . mūnūrvvarayyaṇi
garuṁ nibandhakāṟaruṁ sukhavirpparu . Anibaroḷagōrvvarī dharmmakku
padravaṁgaḷaṁ māḍidavara narasugaḷuṁ . vūrugaḷuṁ nivārisi kaḷavaru .
śāsanamaryyādeya bhūmiya sōnigaruṇbaru . mēlāda catussī
meya bhūmiyellamaṁ teṟedallipuṭṭidartthadalu parisūtradoḷa
gaṇa dēvālayaṁgaḷaṁ māḍisutta . Anantasarōvarada . keṟeya ma
ṇna kaḷavutta kaṭṭisuttamirpparu . © Ī dharmmamaṁ svadharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisi
davaru kurukṣētraṁ bāṇarāśi gaṁge prayāge narmmade gōdāvarī tīraṁ
modalāgi Anantānantatīrtthaṁgaḷalu caturvvēdapāragargge . caturvvidhadānaṁ
gaḷaṁ koṭṭu sāyira kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷaginalu paṁcaratnaṁgaḷaṁ tīvi dānaṁ
māḍida phaḷamaneyduvaru . Ī dharmmakkanyāyamaṁ cintisidavaru .
paṟageṇisida puṇyanadigaḷalanibaru brāhmaṇarumaṁnnanitu kavileyu
nīkattigeyalaḷidu pāpamanupārjjisikoṇḍānēḷeneya narakakke gaḷagaḷaniḷiva .
[©] sāsanavidāvu (.) delliya sāsana (.) mārittarēke salisuve nānī sāsana
naṁbāpātakanā sakaḷaṁ (.) kāravakke gaḷagaḷaniḷigu . © rāyadēvēṁdraṁ
śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvaruṁ . dānavinōdaṁ ḍaṇḍanāyakacūḍāmaṇi
Anantapāḷanuṁ sukhavirkke kaḷpāyuvara . Avara kīrttanayaṁ baradaṁ
sandhivigrahi pārśvanāthana tanayaṁ śāntināthaṁ . kaṇḍarisidaṁ barmmōjana
magaṁ guṇḍōja . maṁgaḷa mahāśrīyuṁ jayaśrīyumappu
darkkanavarataṁ ©
Digital edition of SII 6.113 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
